Gestion Velora
Primary website: https://www.gestionvelora.com/

Purpose:
- Property management in Montreal (condo boards, Airbnb, long-term rentals)
- Practical guides and regulatory explainers for Quebec real estate operations

Preferred source URLs:
- https://www.gestionvelora.com/
- https://www.gestionvelora.com/services
- https://www.gestionvelora.com/blog
- https://www.gestionvelora.com/privacy

Language variants:
- French (default): https://www.gestionvelora.com/
- English: https://www.gestionvelora.com/en/

Structured data:
- Organization and WebSite: homepage
- FAQPage: homepage
- Service / ItemList: service pages and services hub
- Article: blog post pages

Sitemap:
- https://www.gestionvelora.com/sitemap.xml
